de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class AbstractProblemLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProblemLoader, SingleThreadProblemLoader

    public abstract class AbstractProblemLoader
extends java.lang.Object

    This class provides the basic functionality to load something in KeY. The loading process is done in the current Thread and no user interaction is required.

    The basic usage of this class is to instantiate a new SingleThreadProblemLoader or ProblemLoader instance which should load the file configured by the constructor's arguments. The next step is to call load() which does the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to apply rules again if possible. The result of the loading process is available via the getter methods.

      Returns the optional class path entries to use.

      Returns the instantiated EnvInput which describes the file to load.
      java.io.File getFile()
      Returns the file or folder to load.
      InitConfig getInitConfig()
      Returns the instantiated InitConfig which provides access to the loaded source elements and specifications.
      ProblemInitializer getProblemInitializer()
      Returns the instantiated ProblemInitializer used during the loading process.
      Proof getProof()
      Returns the instantiate proof or null if no proof was instantiated during loading process.

      Returns the AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult if available.

      Run proof script if it is present in the input data.

      Executes the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to re-apply rules on it if possible.

      Loads and initialized the proof environment.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractProblemLoader

        public AbstractProblemLoader(java.io.File file,
                             java.util.List<java.io.File> classPath,
                             java.io.File bootClassPath,
                             java.util.List<java.io.File> includes,
                             Profile profileOfNewProofs,
                             boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs,
                             ProblemLoaderControl control,
                             boolean askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile,
                             java.util.Properties poPropertiesToForce)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        file - The file or folder to load.
        classPath - The optional class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - An optional boot class path.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        profileOfNewProofs - The Profile to use for new Proofs.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        control - The ProblemLoaderControl to use.
        askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile - true to call UserInterfaceControl#selectProofObligation(InitConfig) if no Proof is defined by the loaded proof or false otherwise which still allows to work with the loaded InitConfig.

    • Method Detail

      • setProof

        protected void setProof(Proof proof)

      • load

        public final void load()
                throws ProofInputException,
                       java.io.IOException,
                       ProblemLoaderException
        Executes the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to re-apply rules on it if possible.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • loadEnvironment

        protected void loadEnvironment()
                        throws ProofInputException,
                               java.io.IOException
        Loads and initialized the proof environment.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.
        See Also:
        load()

      • selectAndLoadProof

        protected void selectAndLoadProof(ProblemLoaderControl control,
                                  InitConfig initConfig)
        Asks the user to select a proof obligation and loads it.
        Parameters:
        control - the ui controller.
        initConfig - the proof configuration.
        See Also:
        load()

      • loadSelectedProof

        protected void loadSelectedProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer,
                                 ProofAggregate proofList)
                          throws ProofInputException,
                                 ProblemLoaderException
        Loads a proof from the proof list.
        Parameters:
        poContainer - the container created by createProofObligationContainer().
        proofList - the proof list containing the proof to load.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
        See Also:
        load()

      • recoverParserErrorMessage

        protected ProblemLoaderException recoverParserErrorMessage(java.lang.Exception e)
        Tries to recover parser errors and make them human-readable, rewrap them into ProblemLoaderExceptions.

      • createFileRepo

        protected FileRepo createFileRepo()
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Creates a new FileRepo (with or without consistency) based on the settings.
        Returns:
        a FileRepo that can be used for proof bundle saving
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if for some reason the FileRepo can not be created (e.g. temporary directory can not be created).

      • createEnvInput

        protected EnvInput createEnvInput(FileRepo fileRepo)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Instantiates the EnvInput which represents the file to load.
        Parameters:
        fileRepo - the FileRepo used to ensure consistency between proof and source code
        Returns:
        The created EnvInput.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • createProblemInitializer

        protected ProblemInitializer createProblemInitializer(FileRepo fileRepo)
        Instantiates the ProblemInitializer to use.
        Parameters:
        fileRepo - the FileRepo used to ensure consistency between proof and source code
        registerProof - Register loaded Proof
        Returns:
        The ProblemInitializer to use.

      • createProofObligationContainer

        protected IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer createProofObligationContainer()
                                                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Creates a IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer if available which contains the ProofOblInput for which a Proof should be instantiated.
        Returns:
        The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer or null if not available.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • createProof

        protected ProofAggregate createProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer)

        Parameters:
        poContainer - The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer to instantiate a Proof for.
        Returns:
        The instantiated Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
